signals.headline: Elon Musk April Tweet Volume Markets Heating Up | NO whale bets or tips reported | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweet Volume Markets Heating Up | NO whale bets or tips reported | LOW confidence**  
Polymarket's most active markets focus on **Elon Musk tweet counts**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (30% odds for 200-219 tweets, $5M volume) and "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" (18% odds for 1080-1119 tweets, $9M volume with $501K today).[1][2][4]
